message:
fix: guard issue_prefix SetConfig to prevent clobber when rigs share a Dolt database

bootstrap.go and init.go unconditionally overwrote issue_prefix without
checking if one already existed. When multiple rigs shared the same Dolt
database, the last rig to run init/bootstrap would silently clobber the
other rig prefix. This caused 13,645 beads to be created with wrong prefix
in HQ over 5 days (Feb 14-20).

Now both paths check GetConfig first and only set the prefix if empty,
matching the pattern already used in import.go and migrate.go.

Fixes: bd-9b6v1l

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
